visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a black title screen featuring white text advertising the Audi Q6 e-tron. It then cuts to a grey Audi SUV parked at a modern charging station in a residential area. A woman wearing denim overalls walks toward the vehicle, struggling with several large brown paper bags filled with groceries. (2) Close-ups show the woman smiling and walking with her groceries. She approaches the rear of the car and performs a foot-kick motion under the bumper; a light icon is visible on the pavement. The trunk opens automatically, and she loads the bags inside. (3) The woman is then seen plugging a white charging cable into the side of the car. The digital dashboard inside the vehicle illuminates, showing a charging progress screen with a battery icon at 10% and a range of 62 km. (4) Inside the car, the woman relaxes in the driver's seat and begins eating snacks from her bags, looking satisfied. A second shot of the dashboard shows the charge has quickly reached 51% with a 317 km range. She unplugs the charger and begins driving. (5) A driving montage follows, showing the car on bridges and highways under a bright, cloudy sky. Road signs for various Taiwanese cities like Nantou and Chiayi are visible. The woman looks happy behind the wheel. (6) She arrives at a local restaurant in Chiayi with a red 'Chicken Rice' sign. She gets out of the car and sits at an outdoor table with a bowl of food. Realizing she forgot to lock the car, she pulls out her smartphone. (7) A screen recording shows her using the myAudi app to remotely lock the car. The car's side mirrors fold in, and the lights flash. She smiles and continues eating. The video ends with a final promotional shot of the car and the Audi logo.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Audi. [Slogan]: Q6 e-tron. 充 10 min 自我. feat. 美食水水 千千. (2) [Subtitle]: 用 10 分鐘讓味蕾與心靈同步充電 Just 10 minutes to recharge both your cravings and your mood. (3) [Subtitle]: 食物不小心買太多 Accidentally bought way too much food. (4) [Subtitle]: 沒有空的雙手 Hands are full... [Subtitle]: 卻有空的雙腳 but hey, my feet are free. (5) [Variety]: 尾門感應啟動功能 (附指示燈). (6) [Subtitle]: 好餓喔 I'm starving. [Subtitle]: 你知道等車充電的時候最危險嗎? You know the most dangerous time? It's when you're charging the car —. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為會不小心吃掉一整週的零食 Because you might eat a whole week's worth of snacks without realizing. (8) [Subtitle]: 太快了吧 才充 10 分鐘 That was fast! Only 10 minutes of charging?. (9) [Subtitle]: 不然... Well then... [Subtitle]: 現在下嘉義去吃好吃的 Let's head to Chiayi for something delicious. (10) [Subtitle]: 充電 10 分鐘 續航里程可達 255 km (台北 - 嘉義). (11) [Slogan]: 南投 Nantou. [Slogan]: 嘉義 Chiayi. (12) [Subtitle]: 已經想了好幾天了 I've been craving it for days. (13) [Subtitle]: 車門忘了鎖 Forgot to lock the car?. (14) [Subtitle]: 別煩惱 No big deal. [Subtitle]: 現在手機就能鎖 You can just lock it from your phone. (15) [Slogan]: myAudi app 可遠端上鎖或解鎖車輛. (16) [Subtitle]: 充電 10 分鐘 就夠從台北開來嘉義吃美食 10 minutes of charging, and you're all set to drive from Taipei to Chiayi for some amazing food. (17) [Logo]: Audi. [Slogan]: Q6 e-tron. 充 10 min 自我. [Logo]: Audi. [Slogan]: Audi Vorsprung durch Technik.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator (Chien-Chien), approximately 7 passers-by and restaurant patrons in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a white sleeveless top and light denim overalls with a silver necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern urban residential buildings, a commercial EV charging station, highway overpasses, bridges, and a traditional Taiwanese street-side eatery with red signage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-tempo, energetic electronic pop track begins immediately. The female narrator greets the audience with a bright, high-arousal tone. Background audio consists of studio-clean speech mixed with synthesized melodic hooks and a driving percussion beat. (2) Sound of a metallic click triggers a new phase as she demonstrates the trunk sensor. This is followed by the soft whirring of the automatic trunk mechanism and the distinct rustling of plastic and paper grocery bags. (3) A digital 'ding' sound effect signifies the start of the car's charging process. The BGM remains consistent in tempo while the narrator's voice adopts a more casual, conversational style, including the sound of rhythmic crunching as she eats a snack. (4) A rapid 'whoosh' sound transition leads into a driving montage. The music volume swells slightly, and low-frequency tire-on-road hum becomes subtly audible. The narrator continues speaking with high energy and clarity. (5) Acoustic texture shifts to a street-side environment with distant traffic murmurs and muffled restaurant chatter. The sound of ceramic dishes and wooden chopsticks clinking is heard clearly over the music. (6) A series of UI sound effects—soft digital pips and an electronic locking chirp—are heard as she interacts with the smartphone app. The mirrors' mechanical folding sound is synchronized with the audio. (7) The music reaches a triumphant final crescendo as the narrator delivers the brand slogan in a polished, professional cadence before a clean fade-out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem/Solution -> Action -> Convenience -> Branding
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as an integrated promotion for the Audi Q6 e-tron, utilizing a popular food vlogger's 'lifestyle' format to highlight the vehicle's features. It specifically targets the convenience of fast charging (10 mins for 255km), hands-free trunk access, and remote app connectivity, framing them as solutions for a busy, food-focused daily life.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct involvement of the influencer '美食水水 千千' with the Audi product, presence of the brand logo, and specific demonstration of technical features.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends high-end automotive branding with relatable, daily-life scenarios using a local influencer to increase appeal and authenticity.
